name: Title 2

title: A customer email, invoice, or job post may contain the information a system n...

name: Google Shape;534;p58
text: A customer email, invoice, or job post may contain the information a system needs—but scattered across prose, formats, and assumptions.
textPreview: A customer email, invoice, or job post may contain the information a system needs—but scattered across prose, formats, and assumptions.

name: Google Shape;533;p58
text: Unstructured text is rich in detail but difficult to use reliably
textPreview: Unstructured text is rich in detail but difficult to use reliably

name: Google Shape;534;p58
text: JSON Genie gives that information a schema before it becomes an output. The result is easier to inspect, reuse, and trust.
textPreview: JSON Genie gives that information a schema before it becomes an output. The result is easier to inspect, reuse, and trust.

name: Google Shape;533;p58
text: Three ready-made schemas make common extraction work immediate
textPreview: Three ready-made schemas make common extraction work immediate

name: Google Shape;534;p58
text:
Invoice
Vendor, reference number, total, due date, and line items.
textPreview: Invoice | Vendor, reference number, total, due date, and line items.

name: Content Placeholder 1
text:
Job posting
Title, company, location, salary range, and skills.
textPreview: Job posting | Title, company, location, salary range, and skills.

name: Content Placeholder 2
text:
Email
Sender, subject, intent, and follow-up action items.
textPreview: Email | Sender, subject, intent, and follow-up action items.

name: Google Shape;533;p58
text: Custom schemas keep the product useful beyond preset workflows
textPreview: Custom schemas keep the product useful beyond preset workflows

name: Google Shape;558;p61
text:
Define fields
Name exactly what matters to your workflow.
textPreview: Define fields | Name exactly what matters to your workflow.

name: Google Shape;559;p61
text:
Set data types
Use strings, numbers, dates, booleans, or lists.
textPreview: Set data types | Use strings, numbers, dates, booleans, or lists.

name: Google Shape;560;p61
text:
Mark requirements
Make important fields explicit before extraction.
textPreview: Mark requirements | Make important fields explicit before extraction.

name: Google Shape;533;p58
text: Extraction is designed to be visible and reviewable
textPreview: Extraction is designed to be visible and reviewable

name: Content Placeholder 9
text:
Source stays in view
The original text remains beside the resolved fields.
textPreview: Source stays in view | The original text remains beside the resolved fields.

name: Content Placeholder 10
text:
Schema is explicit
A compact preview makes the extraction target clear.
textPreview: Schema is explicit | A compact preview makes the extraction target clear.

name: Content Placeholder 9
text:
Results are inspectable
Switch between field-level review and raw JSON.
textPreview: Results are inspectable | Switch between field-level review and raw JSON.

name: Content Placeholder 15
text: JSON Genie is not a black box. It preserves the context people need to verify the result, then makes the structured output easy to take forward.
textPreview: JSON Genie is not a black box. It preserves the context people need to verify the result, then makes the structured output easy to take f...

name: Google Shape;533;p58
text: Validation makes uncertainty visible instead of hiding it
textPreview: Validation makes uncertainty visible instead of hiding it

name: Google Shape;534;p58
text: Every response is checked against the chosen schema before it reaches the result panel.
textPreview: Every response is checked against the chosen schema before it reaches the result panel.
